name: How long do I have to file a lawsuit if an AI search tool defamed my law practice?
description: 1-3 years from discovery depending on state; document immediately and consult lawyer.[3]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a lawsuit if an AI search tool defamed my law practice?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1-3 years from discovery depending on state; document immediately and consult lawyer.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Statutes of limitations for defamation vary by state (1-3 years typically) and start from discovery of the statement; AI-generated content may complicate timing.[3] No specific precedent exists for AI search defamation claims.[1] Key factors: prove falsity, harm, fault; AI hallucinations common but platforms often immune under Section 230.[3] Act fast by documenting screenshots dated precisely, notify platform, consult defamation specialist within months.[1] Time-sensitive; delay risks dismissal.
